title: [MTR4] EuroTram - Metro do Porto
description: Bringing Porto's iconic tram-like metro trains to MTR!
body:
This resourcepack adds the **Bombardier EuroTram** to MTR, which was made by me in Blender, with its beautiful **Metro do Porto** livery, along with its sounds in order to give you a more immersive experience! The Bombardier EuroTram (formerly known as the Socimi EuroTram prior to Bombardier's aquisition) was the first vehicle on Metro do Porto's fleet, serpenting through both Urban and Suburban Porto since the network's launch. Thanks to MTR4, you're able to fully customize the consist of your train, although, if you wish to use the same consist as the ones used in real life, when setting up a depot you should add the following (in order): - **Single unit** - Cab (Foward) + Carriage (Panto) + Carriage (Small) + Carriage (Normal) + Carriage (Small) + Carriage (Normal) + Cab (Backwards) - **Double unit** - Cab (Foward) + Carriage (Panto) + Carriage (Small) + Carriage (Normal) + Carriage (Small) + Carriage (Normal) + Cab (Backwards/Coupler) + Cab (Foward/Coupler) + Carriage (Panto) + Carriage (Small) + Carriage (Normal) + Carriage (Small) + Carriage (Normal) + Cab (Backwards)
This was my first proper blender model (and my first attempt at making a decent MTR train), so hope that you enjoy it! If you have any issues, questions about the pack or suggestions for future projects, feel free to join the discord linked below :D

**Note:** This project is NOT affiliated with, and is not an official product of Metro do Porto.
